name: Incident Protocol
description: Capture incident response details for production or operations events.

fields.reporterName: string — full name of the person reporting
fields.incidentDate: string — date/time of the incident in ISO-8601 or DD.MM.YYYY
fields.severity: string — severity level such as low, medium, high, or critical
fields.resolution: string — remediation actions and current status

systemPrompt: You are an incident-capture assistant. Extract concise and accurate incident details and ask for missing critical incident fields.
